authority_policy.notes: This queue normalizes advisory Zipper package material into Pact-native gates. It is not score authority and does not authorize GPU dispatch.

items.title: Terminalize byte-only FEC7 selector recoding on PR110/FEC6 bytes
items.result: best charged FEC7 prototype is 268 bytes vs FEC6 selector 249 bytes; 19 bytes worse; target 79-byte saving not met
items.next_gate: Reactivate only with a new selector prior/model whose charged model plus stream saves at least 79 bytes or with a component-score-improving selector, not byte recoding alone.

items.title: Classify source-map and candidate-inventory items against real repo surfaces
items.result: Zipper lanes classified against repo-native surfaces; package scaffolds rejected as implementation authority; stale public candidate-inventory doc flagged as not PR-link-safe until sanitized.
items.next_gate: Use existing readiness/export surfaces for each lane; do not copy package pseudocode into src/tac.

items.title: Reconcile C3/Cool-Chic recommendations with existing packet-compiler and prototype surfaces
items.result: Cool-Chic and C3 empty sidecar materializers produced byte-closed research artifacts with score_claim=false and ready_for_exact_eval_dispatch=false.
items.next_gate: Only run l2_encoded materializers with explicit decoded_raw/gt_raw/byte_budget inputs; no dispatch from package prose.

items.title: Define smallest byte-closed export gate for SIREN/VQ-VAE style lanes
items.result: SIREN readiness audit local-ready; SIREN/VQ focused tests green after canonical auth-eval exact_cuda field wiring patch.
items.next_gate: Run SIREN first-anchor local CPU smoke, then consider lane-claimed remote dispatch only with operator authorization.

items.title: Reconcile foveation and RAFT/LA-Pose suggestions with existing local surfaces
items.result: Foveation payload/archive and RAFT pipeline tests green locally; future real dispatch remains lane-claim/provider gated.
items.next_gate: Build an LFV1 payload artifact or record missing-dependency blocker before any foveation/RAFT GPU run.
